ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation (e.g., Republican, Democratic) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the candidate is running */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the candidate is running for (e.g., Senator, Representative) */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for campaign inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for campaign inquiries */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Candidate's date of birth */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate associated with the event */,
  "event_title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to event coverage */,
  "snippet" TEXT /* Short description or snippet of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Detailed location (e.g., address, city, state, zip code) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees who actually attended */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the event */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., fundraiser, speech) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  "state_flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the state's flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party (e.g., Republican, Democratic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party's platform or ideology */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the party's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the party's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the attendee is associated with */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the attendee (e.g., supporter, volunteer, media) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the attendee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the attendee registered for the event */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the attendee actually attended the event */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the attendee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the feedback */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback given by the attendee */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was provided */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improving future events */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES event_attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member within the campaign (e.g., manager, assistant) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the staff member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member started working on the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member stopped working on the campaign (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the staff member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_staff_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES campaign_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the media */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video, article) */,
  "media_link" TEXT /* Link to the media content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the media content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media content was uploaded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the media content (e.g., news outlet, campaign team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the analytics */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views or participants for the event */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score calculated from various metrics */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Number of people who saw the event content */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on event-related links */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions (e.g., donations, volunteer sign-ups) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score derived from social media and other feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
